description: As part of a security audit, an agent must find and flag any firewall rules that are overly permissive (e.g., 'allow any any').

nodes.task_description: Retrieve all firewall rules from the main corporate firewall.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully downloads the firewall rule set.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the rules to identify any with 'any' in both the source and destination fields.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies three overly permissive rules.

nodes.task_description: Create a report listing the problematic rules and assign it to the security team for review.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a clear report for the security team.
